privacy_modal.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_modal.p1: BSUR Hair values your privacy. This website is purely informational and does not collect any personal data.
privacy_modal.p2: Appointments are made through an external booking website. The processing of personal data through this service is the responsibility of the respective third party.
privacy_modal.p3: This website does not use tracking cookies and does not process personal data through forms or accounts.
privacy_modal.p4: Do you have any questions? Feel free to contact us.

index.hero_sub: Are you ready for your hair journey?

team.concept_p1: At Be As You Are Hair, everything revolves around you. We believe that every person is unique and that your hair should be a reflection of that. Our team creates hairstyles that are not only beautiful, but also perfectly suited to your personality, appearance and lifestyle.
team.concept_p2: With craftsmanship, attention to detail and the latest techniques, we provide a luxury experience where quality and care come first. Whether you choose a subtle look, a complete transformation or a nourishing treatment – we listen to your wishes and offer professional advice tailored to your hair type, energy & lifestyle. For us, hair is more than just appearance. It's about confidence, presence and feeling good about yourself.
team.ambassador_p1: BSUR Hair is proud to be an official Keune Ambassador Salon. This means we work with the premium products of Keune Haircosmetics, a Dutch family business that has been renowned since 1922 for quality, innovation and hair and scalp care.
team.ambassador_p2: As Keune ambassadors, we receive exclusive training and access to the latest developments and techniques in the field. This allows us to always offer our clients the best treatments, the most beautiful colours and the most nourishing products.
team.ambassador_p3: Keune products are not only professional and reliable, but also developed with a focus on sustainability and the well-being of people and nature. So you can be assured of a hairstyle that not only looks amazing, but also stays healthy.
team.ambassador_p5: At BSUR Hair, we combine our passion and expertise with the quality of Keune – for a result that is entirely tailored to you.
team.danny_bio: I'm Danny Selens, owner and creative director of BSUR Hair in Rotterdam. For over 20 years I've worked with hair and love passing on my knowledge to the next generation of stylists. My focus is on natural-looking colours, strong shapes and hairstyles that fall effortlessly and suit who you are. My tip? Don't follow trends, choose a look that suits your hair and lifestyle. My motto: Be As You Are!
team.andy_bio: I'm Andy. I'm a junior hairstylist and recently started training in men's cuts and beard styling. My focus is on men's hairstyles, head massages and extravagant colours. My best tip? Choose a look that feels like you.
team.esmeralda_bio: Hi, I'm Esmeralda. I'm a hairstylist and also studying to become a salon manager. My passion lies in transformations, creating a look that truly suits you. Everyone is welcome in my chair — together we'll create hair that lets your personality shine. My hair tip? Stay true to yourself, because the most beautiful hair is hair that belongs to you.
team.dorette_bio: I'm Dorette, born in 1973 in Rotterdam. Besides being a hairstylist, I'm also an artist — I paint portraits and do pottery. I see a new haircut as a little work of art too: it needs to be proportional, balanced and fully aligned with the client's wishes. If I really have to choose... I enjoy cutting even more than colouring, especially shorter styles.

prijslijst.title: Price List
prijslijst.note: * All prices are indicative and may vary based on hair length/thickness, treatment time and product usage.
prijslijst.modal_p1: Not sure or new to us? Feel free to call +31 6 22492470 and our team will be happy to help.
prijslijst.modal_p2: All prices are indicative and may vary based on hair length, thickness, treatment time and product usage.
prijslijst.treatment_modal_title: You don't see the time or treatment you want?
prijslijst.treatment_modal_p: Contact BSUR Hair +316 2249 2470 and we'll see what we can do to accommodate you. For highlights, balayage or other time intensive services we prefer you give us a call.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I cancel my appointment?
faq.a1:
You can cancel your appointment by phone or by email.

Cancelling by email:

1. In your confirmation or reminder email, you will find a link under your appointment date saying "Cancel your appointment".
2. The link will take you to an external website where you will see a green "Cancel appointment" button with the relevant date and time.
3. Click it, and you will see a confirmation that your appointment has been successfully cancelled. You can also book a new appointment at that point.

If you do not receive a cancellation confirmation email, please call or message us at +31 6 22492470 and our team will be happy to help.

Please note: our cancellation policy applies.
faq.a2:
More than 48 hours in advance
➤ Free cancellation or rescheduling.

Between 48 and 24 hours in advance
➤ 50% of the treatment cost will be charged.

Within 24 hours or no-show
➤ 100% of the treatment cost will be charged.
faq.a3: We are open on Tuesday, Thursday and Friday from 09:00–17:00, and Saturday from 09:00–16:00.
faq.q4: Can I book an appointment online or by phone?
faq.a4: Yes, you can easily book an appointment online via our website or by calling 06 22492470.
faq.q5: Do you use special products for coloured or damaged hair?
faq.a5: Yes, we use high-quality professional products by Keune Haircosmetics that nourish and protect the hair.
faq.q6: Do you offer a student discount?
faq.a6: Yes, we offer special discounts for students. You can ask about this at the desk before paying after your treatment. Please bring your student card.
faq.q7: Do you offer head massages or hair treatments?
faq.a7: Yes, we offer relaxing and nourishing scalp and hair treatments. Our colleague Andy specialises in this — you can book a treatment with him.
faq.q8: Can I visit if I have allergies or a sensitive scalp?
faq.a8: Yes, we work with skin-friendly Keune products and are happy to advise which ones suit you best. If it's your first visit and you have any sensitivities, please let our team know right away so we can take this into account.
faq.q9: Do you use vegan or cruelty-free products?
faq.a9: Yes, we use Keune products that are vegan and cruelty-free. Please note: only the So Pure range by Keune is 100% vegan. All other Keune products are cruelty-free.
faq.q10: Can I book a trial appointment for a special occasion?
faq.a10: Yes, we offer trial appointments for weddings, parties and other special occasions.
faq.q11: Can I purchase the products you use?
faq.a11: Yes, almost all products we use are available for purchase in our salon. The exception is certain salon-only products.
faq.q12: Do I need an appointment or can I walk in?
faq.a12: We prefer to work by appointment so we can give everyone the attention they deserve. Walk in spontaneously and we have time? We'll gladly help you right away!
faq.q13: Why is there a price difference between stylists?
faq.a13:
Our salon has stylists at different levels of experience and specialisation, which is why we apply price differences per level.

A treatment with a Top Stylist has a different rate than with a Hairstylist, reflecting the difference in expertise. You can always count on the same quality, service and attention.

This way you can choose the stylist and price that suits you best.

voorwaarden.title: Terms & Conditions
voorwaarden.intro: These terms and conditions apply to all treatments and appointments at BSUR Hair. By booking an appointment, you agree to the terms below.
voorwaarden.p1: Appointments can be made online, by phone or in the salon. An appointment is only confirmed once you receive a confirmation. The client is responsible for providing correct contact details.
voorwaarden.p2:
More than 48 hours in advance
➤ Free cancellation or rescheduling.

Between 48 and 24 hours in advance
➤ 50% of the treatment cost will be charged.

Within 24 hours or no-show
➤ 100% of the treatment cost will be charged.

Cancellations are only valid via the official cancellation link in the confirmation email or by phone. Replying to emails does not count as a valid cancellation.
voorwaarden.p3: If you arrive more than 10 minutes late, we reserve the right to shorten or cancel the treatment. In this case, costs may be charged in full or in part.
voorwaarden.p4: All prices on the website are indicative. Prices may vary based on hair length, time required and product usage. Payment is due immediately after the treatment.
voorwaarden.p5: Clients are required to inform us of any allergies, medical conditions or sensitivities in advance. BSUR Hair is not liable for any damage resulting from incorrect or incomplete information provided.
voorwaarden.p6: Any complaints must be reported immediately after the treatment or within 48 hours at the latest, so we can work together towards a suitable solution.
voorwaarden.p7: Discounts and promotions cannot be combined unless stated otherwise. Student discount is only valid upon presentation of a valid student card.
voorwaarden.p8: Personal data is processed in accordance with our privacy policy. Your data is used solely for appointments and communication.
voorwaarden.note: BSUR Hair reserves the right to amend these terms and conditions at any time.
